title: Tom's and Create Smashed
description: Surgeticly Retexture Tom's Simple Storage with Create's Texture
body:
A resource pack that retextures most of **Tom's Simple Storage**'s block with **Create**'s brass texture
And GUI of Storage Terminal and Crafting Terminal with Crafting Schematic texture

Currently, there are a lot of blocks and gui **left unchanged**,
_might_ finish the rest in the future

This resource pack requires Tom's Simple Storage
